title: Forza Horizon 4

notes:
I tried all Proton versions (GE, Experimental, latest, 6,3-8), looked at what worked for others and tried that but it does not work.

Using gamescope was also not a fix unfortunately as a lot of people suggested.

The game boots into the menu consistently, lets me log in to the abhorrent Microsoft Account (it should be illegal to require log in if I paid for the cluckin' game or put it in the name Forza Horizon 4 (Microsoft Login Required)) but fails when I press "Continue" to play.

The spinny thingy in the bottom right spins for a bit, everything freezes for a few seconds and then unfreezes and then it closes itself.

Welp tbh did not put any effort to fix this obviously and am not going to and instead get a refund.
title: Forza Horizon 4
